summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Berachain arbitrage trading engine. Backend APIs are highly functional (94.7% success rate, 18/19 endpoints working). Frontend loads correctly but has WebSocket connectivity issues preventing real-time opportunity display.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 'Pool not found' for WBERA/HONEY pair query
minor_bugs.impact: Pool reserves functionality not working, may affect liquidity checks

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection to 'wss://smart-arb-bot-1.preview.emergentagent.com/ws/prices' fails with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'
REST API fallback not displaying opportunities that backend /api/opportunities endpoint returns (backend has 2 opportunities: WBERA/HONEY $0.39 profit, WBERA/USDC $0.02 profit)

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns healthy status with RPC connected (block 17913620)
GET /api/engine/stats returns cache and safety limit info
GET /api/honeypot/check/{token} returns honeypot detection (HONEY token safe, 0.62% tax)
POST /api/execute-trade validates and builds transactions with proper safety checks
Dashboard page loads with all UI components (header, stats cards, tables, portfolio, gas settings)
Opportunities ranking logic works (highest net profit first)
Safety checks work (slippage limits, trade size limits, profit thresholds)
Gas price fetching works (very low testnet gas ~0.00001 gwei)
Token list endpoint works (6 supported tokens)
Frontend UI renders correctly with proper styling

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (UI loads correctly, but data integration has issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connection issue and ensure REST API fallback properly displays opportunities in frontend. The backend is serving 2 opportunities but frontend shows 0. Also investigate /api/pool/reserves 404 error for pool liquidity checks.
